# Doni Wirawan

> Doni Wirawan builds small, free, privacy-first web tools. The public ones run
> entirely in the browser and upload nothing you put into them. He also builds and
> maintains the sites and internal software for the Studio Five group and a set of
> marine-fuel companies.

Site: https://doniwirawan.xyz

## Free tools

- [Ascent](https://ascent-analytics.doniwirawan.xyz): a Strava analytics dashboard. [Source](https://github.com/doniwirawan/Ascent-Strava-Dashboard)
- [Bike Fit Analyzer](https://bikefit.doniwirawan.xyz): browser-based bike fit analysis. [Source](https://github.com/doniwirawan/bike-fit-analyzer)
- [Aksara Bali](https://aksarabali.doniwirawan.xyz): a Latin-to-Balinese script transliterator, and an educational tool for reading, writing and preserving Aksara Bali. There is an offline Android app in Play Store testing — [join the test](https://play.google.com/apps/testing/xyz.doniwirawan.aksara_bali_mobile), then install from the [listing](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=xyz.doniwirawan.aksara_bali_mobile). [Source](https://github.com/doniwirawan/aksara-bali)
- [SPMB Bali 2026](https://spmbbali.doniwirawan.xyz): Bali school-admission data, made searchable. [Source](https://github.com/doniwirawan/spmb-bali-2026)

## Other work

- [Terrafarms](https://terrafarms.id): agritech, built with his team at Bangkit Academy.
- [Studio Five Suite](https://suite.studiofiveweddings.com), [Deliverables Tracker](https://tracker.studiofiveweddings.com) and [Chapter5](https://chapter5.studiofiveweddings.com): internal software for the Studio Five group.
- [Before The Win Summit](https://www.beforethewinsummit.com/): event site.

## Pages

- [Home](https://doniwirawan.xyz/): projects, background, cycling and reading.
- [Blog](https://doniwirawan.xyz/blog): notes on the tools he builds, cycling, and the occasional thing he got wrong. Individual posts live at /blog/<slug> and are server-rendered, so their full text is in the HTML.
- [Sitemap](https://doniwirawan.xyz/sitemap.xml): every page, including every published post.
- [Terms](https://doniwirawan.xyz/terms)
- [Privacy](https://doniwirawan.xyz/privacy)
